aa8e7884-ec92-4f03-8b84-78e287ba19c2.legendary_hook: The Brine lineage keeps producing suspiciously gifted children and one excellent accordion player.

6c9195b2-4bc8-4836-b10b-89bb1951cd35.legendary_hook: Nobody can prove it, but the Pepperglow family has won every major soup dispute since year three.

989fcd47-efa8-474a-8e01-8dc37f15845c.legendary_hook: The Fernwick family is rumored to settle arguments with desserts and thunderous eye contact.

77ef5049-1e3a-4e26-a150-564a99cb3ea2.legendary_hook: The Vale lineage keeps producing suspiciously gifted children and one excellent accordion player.

516e07aa-2039-4640-8837-e6c7cc905fc4.legendary_hook: Nobody can prove it, but the Thistle family has won every major soup dispute since year three.

plaza.name: Clocktower Plaza
plaza.description: The town square where gossip arrives before the pigeons do.

cafe.name: Sigh & Sip Tea House
cafe.description: A velvet tea room where confessions happen over cinnamon foam.

market.name: Turnip Jubilee Market
market.description: A market where vegetables are sold, judged, and occasionally applauded.

garden.name: Whisper Fern Garden
garden.description: A moonlit garden where people practice forgiveness and suspiciously elegant flirting.
garden.mood: soft, fragrant, and a little haunted

hall.name: Town Hall of Mildly Alarming Decisions
hall.description: Where committees meet and somehow always invent new formal hats.

riverbank.name: Moonbucket Riverbank
riverbank.description: A dreamy bank with fireflies, reeds, and at least one dramatic confession per week.

events.headline: The Spring Umbrella Parade begins with overconfident sincerity
events.description: The town gathers for The Spring Umbrella Parade, prepared for joy, drama, and at least one wildly unnecessary hat.

events.headline: Poppy whispers dangerous gossip to Selkie
events.description: Poppy leans toward Selkie at Whisper Fern Garden and shares a rumor about ornamental turnips, with the gravity of a royal decree. Selkie promises nothing and absolutely spreads it later.
